images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model embodying a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, standing amidst vast desert sand dunes. She wears a form-fitting flight attendant uniform featuring a tight pencil skirt and a crisp white blouse, unbuttoned just enough to hint at her ample chest, layered with a textured leather biker jacket draped casually over her shoulders to accentuate her slim waist and curvy silhouette. With an innocent, playful gaze directed at the camera, she strikes a cute, candid pose, radiating a youthful charm. The background is a soft, sun-drenched bokeh of the dunes, rendered with a film-like grainy texture. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
